events.speaker: Mr. Bell
events.text: Can an object move while forces are balanced?

events.speaker: Maya
events.text: I am confused, balanced means stopped right?

events.speaker: Owen
events.text: Not sure how it keeps moving with no net force.

events.speaker: Mr. Bell
events.text: Picture a puck already gliding on frictionless ice: equal arrows mean no acceleration, not no motion.

events.question: Zero net force permits constant velocity
